title: Update containers/image to 5e5b67d6b1cf43cc349128ec3ed7d5283a6cc0d1
body: `github.com/containers/image/copy.Image()` now returns the copied manifest (as of https://github.com/containers/image/pull/519), so we at least need to ignore it.

comments.body:
👍 , thanks!

Let’s do the rebase/merge tomorrow to minimize the CI breakage time.
